title: [Forked] CTM Overhaul (Connected Textures)
description: Adds connected textures, now with new versions!
body:
# [Forked] CTM Overhaul

This pack aims to add lots of connected textures using the OptiFine or Continuity mods!
This pack requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).

---

<details>
<summary>All supported blocks</summary>

- All Ores
- Cartography Table
- Chiseled Polished Blackstone
- Chiseled Red Sandstone
- Chiseled Sandstone
- Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Copper (and its weathered, exposed, and oxidized versions)
- Cut Copper (and its weathered, exposed, and oxidized versions)
- Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks
- Cracked Stone Bricks
- Cut Red Sandstone
- Cut Sandstone
- Diamond Block
- Emerald Block
- End Stone Bricks
- Froglights
- Gold Block
- Iron Block
- Lapis Block
- Mossy Stone Bricks
- Netherite Block
- Polished Blocks
- Prismarine Bricks
- Purpur Pillar
- Quartz Bricks
- Quartz Block
- Redstone Block
- Redstone Lamp
- Reinforced Deepslate
- Sea lantern
- Shroomlight
- Smooth Stone
- Stone Bricks
- Tinted Glass

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Additional Information</summary>

Based on a CC0 resource pack by xokz. Original assets remain CC0; modifications and distribution are ARR. This resource pack is not affiliated with CTM Overhaul or any of it's creators.

---
Original Credits:

- Xokz
- Sammydoodlew
- J.
- SioulTheEpic
- Cart3r
- Miffen Kop

</details>
